global_description: A medium-sized hummingbird with a compact, streamlined body. Predominantly iridescent green with a metallic sheen, featuring a distinctive violet ear patch. The bird has a slightly curved black bill and a forked tail with blue and green hues.

part_details.plumage: Bright iridescent green with a metallic sheen, covering most of the body.
part_details.ear_patch: Distinctive violet patch located behind the eyes.
part_details.tail: Forked with a mix of blue and green feathers.
part_details.wings: Narrow and pointed, aiding in rapid flight.

spatial_relations: The violet ear patch is located behind the eyes on each side of the head.
The slightly curved bill extends from the front of the head.
The forked tail is positioned at the rear of the body.
